reviews.comment:
Muy buenos los baños y su limpieza. No disponen de una rampa de acceso de discapacitados adecuada, pero hay que admitir que la amabilidad y actitud de servicio de sus empleados ayudó a superar el inconveniente.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms were very clean and well maintained. They don't have a proper wheelchair access ramp, but the staff's kindness and helpful attitude helped overcome the inconvenience.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodDdfckVBEAE

reviews.comment:
Si se despacha combustible durante las 24 hs., porque no se mantiene el bar abierto en el mismo horario y el minimercado también.
Muchos además de cargar combustibles aprovechamos esa detención para descansar del manejo y tomar algún refrigerio.

(Translated by Google)
Fuel is dispensed 24 hours a day, so why doesn't the snack bar and convenience store stay open at the same hours?
In addition to fueling up, many of us take advantage of this break to take a break from driving and grab a snack.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURocDctX3p3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mala experiencia. Cargué nafta el martes cerca del mediodía, el empleado, se quedó con algo más de $1000, le di demás sin darme cuenta, le pregunté si estaba bien, me dijo que sí.
Ya sé la culpa la tuve yo, por confiar el el otro.

(Translated by Google)
Bad experience. I filled up my gas station on Tuesday around noon. The attendant kept a little over $1000; I gave him too much without realizing it. I asked him if it was okay, and he said yes.
I know it was my fault for trusting him.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoay1EdlJREAE
